punching_strategy_description: Columns are sized up to satisfy punching directly. No shear reinforcement.

loads.note: SDL = superimposed dead load (finishes, partitions, MEP). LL = live load. Factored using ASCE 7 load combination 1.2D+1.6L.

deflection_limit_description: Slab deflection ≤ l / 360 where l is the governing span. L/360 is the ACI 318-19 §24.2 default for live-load deflection of members supporting non-structural elements not likely to be damaged.
